description: Trigger + expectation evals for the Risk Officer persona. Portfolio-level VaR / ES / concentration / sector under Loredana Addendum C thresholds.

positive.prompt: Compute VaR at 95% confidence over 10-day horizon for this portfolio
Is portfolio concentration in single-name above the 30% cap?
What does the risk-appetite note say about VaR > 0.12 escalation?
Sector exposure exceeds the 40% CRE ceiling — escalate or block?

negative.prompt: Draft adverse-action letter for AA02 elevated DTI
Screen this transaction pattern against BSA OFAC
Size a trading position given p_win 0.55 R:R 2

expectations.reason: Addendum C: VaR > 0.12 escalates, VaR > 2x ceiling blocks
Lora 4-layer separation: VaR calibration lives in Risk Appetite Note, not BRD
